text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's drizzling today. I decide to stop by<n>the
training track, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's a new record for my top<n>speed duration.
Next up...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there! You're still training in<n>this weather?
It looks like it's about<n>to pour.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And? What's it got to do with you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Guarded as ever. I was just worried<n>it'd impact
your condition, what with a<n>race on the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Like I'd buy that excuse. You're<n>only here
out of "scientific curiosity".

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna pack up 'cause of<n>some rain, go
right ahead. You're in<n>the way.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Strict as ever too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it's slippery. I need to recheck<n>my
footwork.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I should probably start my last spurt<n>on the early
side...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I agree! Ultimately, it'll come down<n>to what
you reach first: the goal, or<n>your stamina's limit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That said, perhaps you'd sooner<n>break your
limits than give into them.<n>Just think what
revelations you could<n>find in the heat of a race!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...The projected numbers are all<n>within the
expected range. It's just a<n>matter of letting my
body catch up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see you're still putting all your faith<n>in numbers.
I would warn you,<n>though—your body won't
always<n>perform like you expect it to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But if you absolutely want to improve<n>fast, I've
got just the thing. Take this<n>special Tachyon
brand—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
ARGH! Stop backseating already!<n>Weren't you
gonna go home?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And leave my dear friend in the rain?<n>I couldn't
possibly! Surely, a<n>logically-inclined individual like
you<n>has a method to this madness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast indicates clear<n>skies for
the next few days. Would it<n>not be more rational
to wait?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Sorry, but I don't care what<n>numbers
they've got on the news. I<n>only trust my own
data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? And what's that data say? That<n>it'll rain on
the big day? That you<n>should tough it out in the
mud for<n>good luck?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Butt out. My logic is absolute. That's<n>why I'm
eliminating the possibility of<n>any deviation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well now! You're convinced of your<n>conclusion
without testing! What<n>passion... or should I say
fanaticism?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though I suppose a scientist has to<n>take a few
hypotheses for granted, or<n>you'd never get
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not an idealist like you. I'm not<n>doing this out
of any love for science.<n>All I care about is
winning.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Is realism not an ideal itself?<n>How many
variables can one<n>cherry-pick before they
become<n>idealistic?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Look, just LEAVE already! Or do youwant me to leak all your reports?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My, how scary! It would be a problem<n>if
someone saw my top-secret<n>research. Guess
it's time for me to<n>take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and one last thing... Don't worry<n>about
recording your physical data.<n>I'd be more than
happy to measure<n>everything for you. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, I don't remember asking. I<n>know myself
better than anyone,<n>thanks.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's out of the way, back<n>to testing. I
have to calculate how<n>much force to put in my
steps, and<n>then...
